title: drama 模式 duration_seconds 省略测试（ArcReel 默认 8）

image_prompt.scene: Misty morning at a martial arts training ground with ancient stone tiles, a lone swordsman in simple cloth robes practicing sword forms under a centuries-old willow tree, morning fog swirling around practice dummies and weapon racks, soft dawn light filtering through the canopy.

composition.lighting: Soft dawn light filtering through fog, cool blue-gray tones
composition.ambiance: Mysterious and serene atmosphere with swirling mist particles

video_prompt.action: The swordsman executes a slow deliberate sword kata, blade cutting through morning mist, droplets flying off the sword tip
video_prompt.ambiance_audio: Distant birdsong, wind through willow branches, rhythmic swishing of sword through air

dialogue.speaker: 叶尘
dialogue.line: 第一千次了，还是差一点。

image_prompt.scene: A secluded bamboo grove beside the martial training ground at dusk, ancient moss-covered stone path winding through, a jade-hued sword with intricate engravings resting on a flat rock illuminated by the last rays of gold-orange sunset light.

composition.lighting: Warm golden hour sunlight from left, casting long shadows through bamboo
composition.ambiance: Peaceful twilight, dust motes floating in diagonal sunbeams

video_prompt.action: The swordsman kneels beside the rock, fingers tracing the faded characters on the manual with reverence
video_prompt.ambiance_audio: Wind rustling through bamboo, distant temple bell, birds settling for the night
